action.reasoning: Observation: In iteration 17, I'm getting a RuntimeError: 'The size of tensor a (867) must match the size of tensor b (819) at non-singleton dimension 2' in the make_att_2d_masks function. This error occurs during the forward pass of the Pi0 model, specifically when trying to perform an element-wise operation on attention masks that have different sizes. This suggests there's a mismatch in the dimensions of the language tokens or their attention masks. Analysis: The issue is likely related to how I'm handling the language tokens and attention masks in the prepare_batch_for_pi0 function. The language tokens and attention masks need to have matching dimensions, but they're currently having different lengths (867 vs 819). This could be due to inconsistent tokenization or padding of the instructions. Decision: I need to fix the language tokenization in prepare_batch_for_pi0 to ensure all tokens and attention masks have consistent dimensions.
